race.comment: Open race and a few of these raced on Saturday, including SUITS and BRAT who ran 1-2 in a similar race. Sticking with the in-form UNCLE BARRY (10) who has two wins and two seconds from last five. Has switched yard and is having first try here but is well versed on dirt tracks. Best figures stack up and can kick off for the new yard with a win.  IN NO DOUBT (6) has been thereabouts without winning and looks well placed here. Beaten only a couple of lengths here latest and should feature despite the wide draw. Same goes for ZESTIMAN (5). Hasn't really threatened last two but has been racing in tougher class. This suits. SCISSOR ME TIMBERS (4) continues to race well and has led and been grabbed over slightly further last couple. Take catching this trip. FRAWLEY (3) is building to a win and must be included.
